summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google Analytics GA4 and Facebook Pixel integration on Voletron landing page. All core analytics functionality working correctly with proper event tracking on WhatsApp button clicks.

ui_bugs.issue: Floating WhatsApp button has element stability issues preventing reliable clicks
ui_bugs.impact: Minor - button functionality works but may be difficult to click due to CSS animations or positioning

passed_tests: Google Analytics GA4 loads with correct ID (G-ZRZF7G8DNS)
Facebook Pixel loads with correct ID (1407734350658288)
PageView tracking works on page load (6 dataLayer entries)
WhatsApp button click events fire correctly (click_whatsapp for GA, lead_whatsapp for FB)
All 10 WhatsApp buttons are functional and visible
Event tracking includes proper location parameters
Page navigation works correctly (Simulação, Engenheiro, Projetos sections)
Scripts load asynchronously for performance (77% async)
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix floating WhatsApp button stability issue - element positioning or CSS animations may be causing click instability. This is a minor UI enhancement and doesn't affect core analytics functionality.
success_percentage: Frontend: 95% - All core analytics integration features working perfectly. Only minor UI stability issue with floating button.
